title: RealisticMinecraft+
body:
A collection of mods that makes Minecraft as realistic as possible without 50+ mods. It's perfect for those with worse PC's and works for others as well!

**It features**

- Better Sounds
- New World Generation
- Physics
- Shaders
- Patrix
- Many, Many Performance Mods

If you enjoyed the modpack, you should check out my other cool projects.
- [https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-optimizations](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-optimizations)
- [https://modrinth.com/modpack/nts-minecraft-pro](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nts-minecraft-pro)
- [https://modrinth.com/modpack/realisticworld](https://modrinth.com/modpack/realisticworld)
